text: LIVER:  The functional relationship between these KEs is consistent with biological knowledge. [Kamimura and Tsukamoto, 1995; Li et al.,2008; Kolios et al., 2006; Bataller and Brenner, 2005; Lee and Friedman,2011; Guo and Friedman, 2007; Brenner,2009, Fujiwara  and Kobayashi, 2005; Kirkham, 2007; Reuter et al., 2010]
